findings.title: Data is shuffled (grouped by version, not chronologically)
findings.description: aggregated_live.jsonl is grouped by version, not sorted by issue. 1712 shuffle positions detected.
findings.impact: Raw JSONL reading gives incorrect time-series order. loader.py applies sorting.
findings.mitigation: Ensure all consumers use loader.py or apply sorting.

findings.title: v12 backtest records missing status field
findings.description: v12 has 863 backtest records with status=None, while other versions use status='resolved'
findings.impact: Inconsistent data schema. Status filtering may behave differently.
findings.mitigation: Add status='resolved' to v12 backtest records.

findings.title: v7 missing issue 2026144
findings.description: v7 has gap in issue coverage
findings.impact: v7 analysis for recent buckets may be incomplete.

findings.title: Multiple timestamps per issue
findings.description: 863 issues have predictions from multiple versions at different times
findings.impact: This is expected for multi-version backtesting.

findings.title: Walk-forward validation implemented correctly
findings.description: backtest_runner.py properly excludes current period from history.

findings.title: No lookahead bias detected
findings.description: No future function usage or feature leakage found.

findings.title: Pending records properly excluded from metrics
findings.description: metrics.py correctly filters out pending=True records.
